findings.summary: INT-001 blocks desktop typecheck — 3 errors (2 TS2307 for missing github-ipc.ts + ipc-validation.ts, 1 TS7006 implicit any). IPC test also fails with module not found.
TEL-001 completed — Bus events now published from task.ts at lifecycle points. TEL-002 builds on same pattern for phase-transition events at tool call boundaries.
CI-002 unblocked by CI-001 completion. Contention detection for produce_fragment shared file collisions.
10 pre-existing GitHub test failures: stubs for extractResponseText and formatPromptTooLargeError always return null/empty instead of implementing logic.
4 background tasks launched: INT-001 lane-owner, TEL-002 lane-owner, CI-002 lane-owner, GitHub test repair agent. All running simultaneously.
Tool.define enum pattern: use Schema.Literals(['a','b']) not Schema.Literal(a,b,c). Desktop IPC pattern: electron-store + produce_fragment for shared files.
INT-001 resolved: github-ipc.ts and ipc-validation.ts created. Desktop typecheck passes. IPC tests pass (26/26).
CI-002 implemented: contention detection module (contention.ts) with in-memory fragment tracking, anchor overlap heuristics, and Bus event emission. Integrated into CoordinationTool.
TEL-002 implemented: SubagentPhaseChanged event, execution.ts publish helpers, integrated into session/tools.ts tool dispatch for both built-in and MCP tools.
10 failing GitHub tests fixed: extractResponseText and formatPromptTooLargeError reimplemented in test file. All 17 tests pass.
coord-events.ts consolidated with all 6 events: TaskStatusChanged, PathClaimed, SessionHeartbeat, ActivityLogged, FragmentContention (CI-002), SubagentPhaseChanged (TEL-002).
